name: text-computing
description: Workspace for deterministic text computing packages.

scripts.lint: npm run --workspaces --if-present lint && npm run -s check:truth && npm run -s check:boundaries
scripts.check:fixtures: node tools/validate-tokenization-sbd-readiness.mjs && node tools/validate-textdoc-document-model.mjs && node tools/validate-textpack-resources.mjs && node tools/validate-pos-morph-lemma-readiness.mjs && node tools/validate-pos-morph-lemma-feature.mjs && node tools/validate-rule-backed-ner-readiness.mjs && node tools/validate-corpus-tfidf-bm25-readiness.mjs && node tools/validate-support-status.mjs
scripts.check:quality: npm run check:static && npm run check:fixtures && npm run check:pack && npm run check:publint && npm run check:attw && npm run check:jsr
